data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the quiz/assessment option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the quiz/assessment option to confirm that users have read the policy documents. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or confirmations regarding the implementation of this feature. The linked use case mentions the need for a quiz/assessment option, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks presented that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the quiz/assessment option.
